name: Skibidi Toilet FPS Shooting Survival
description: Skibidi Toilet FPS Shooting Survival is an exhilarating video game that combines fast-paced first-person shooting action with a unique twist. Players find themselves in a perilous situation as they battle enemies in a world where toilets become battlegrounds. With a quirky and humorous concept, this game offers a refreshing take on the traditional FPS genre. Strategize, shoot, and survive in this wacky virtual arena filled with unexpected challenges and laughter-inducing moments. Get ready to plunge into the Skibidi Toilet FPS Shooting Survival adventure! Website Developer <a href='https://www.kizi10.org/'>https://www.kizi10.org/</a>
instructions: WASD walk mouse left shoot and mouse right AIM
tags: Mentolatux, Shooter, Shooting, Skibidi, Skibidi Toilet, Unity3D, WebGL
